prohibited_paths: agent-decided vulnerability severity or disclosure timing
preconditions: TASK-000008 ownership limits are explicit or incident staffing gaps remain blocked
TASK-000009 update dry-run evidence exists or the patch exercise records update-capacity as blocked
checked no-claim incident patch rehearsal template remains current

checked no-claim incident/patch readiness-review template remains current and cannot be cited for incident-response readiness, emergency patch capacity, supported security versions, production-safe browsing, disclosure authority, stable promotion, signing authority, incident closure authority, or implementation evidence
private report channel and confidential evidence handling are available for tabletop material
queue status remains proposed; this specified manifest is non-executable
a named owner and named independent reviewer replace the role placeholders before this manifest can become ready
acceptance_criteria: checked no-claim incident patch rehearsal inventory is treated as planning evidence until tabletop records, emergency patch dry-run evidence, and role review exist

first executable incident patch rehearsal record starts from the checked no-claim incident patch rehearsal template and replaces template-only fields with real private-intake tabletop, emergency-patch dry-run, regression/backport, fake signing/update dry-run, disclosure, postmortem, role-matrix, backup-coverage, and owner-review evidence

first incident/patch readiness review starts from the checked no-claim incident/patch readiness-review template and replaces template-only null rehearsal_record, reference_platform, private_channel, owner_reviewer, independent_reviewer, security_reviewer, release_operations_reviewer, legal_reviewer, and support_reviewer fields with owner-reviewed evidence beyond the template
private intake tabletop covers report access control, acknowledgement, reproduction, severity, asset analysis, affected-version statement, embargo handling, and sanitized evidence preservation

emergency patch rehearsal covers protected patch branch, embargoed CI, regression test, backport decision, signing and update dry run, staged rollout, minimum secure version, revocation, release notes, user and admin communication, CVE and credit handling, coordinated disclosure, and postmortem remediation

incident-class workflow covers active exploitation, update or signing compromise, dependency vulnerability, data loss, privacy leak, sandbox regression, malicious extension or provider, and service outage

role matrix names owner, reviewer, release, security, legal, support, and on-call responsibilities with timing targets, escalation path, secret rotation, and no agent disclosure, stable-promotion, or signing authority
negative_tests: public issue flow cannot retain exploitable vulnerability details after private escalation
agents cannot decide severity, disclosure timing, incident closure, stable promotion, or signing

checked no-claim incident patch rehearsal template cannot be cited as executed private-intake tabletop, emergency patch dry run, regression or backport evidence, signing or update dry-run evidence, disclosure rehearsal, postmortem, role review, backup coverage, owner review, incident-response readiness, emergency patch capacity, supported security, disclosure authority, stable promotion, signing authority, incident closure, production-safe browsing, or implementation evidence

checked no-claim incident/patch readiness-review template cannot be cited as owner review, incident-response readiness, emergency patch capacity, supported security versions, production-safe browsing, disclosure authority, stable promotion, signing authority, incident closure, or implementation evidence
tabletop success cannot hide missing update capacity, missing owner coverage, missing regression evidence, or unresolved support targets
security incident documentation cannot imply production-safe browsing or supported security versions

rollback.strategy: Revert incident workflow and readiness wording if private handling, patch dry-run, or authority boundaries are rejected.
